user.title: Absaar Inverter Setup
user.description: How should Home Assistant connect to your inverter?

menu_options.local: Local (inverter connects directly to Home Assistant)

cloud.title: Absaar Cloud
cloud.description: Enter your Absaar EMS credentials to connect your inverter system through the vendor cloud.

local.title: Absaar Local
local.description: Home Assistant will listen for the inverter's datalogger on the given TCP port — no cloud account needed. Point the datalogger at your Home Assistant IP (or provide its web address below and the integration will keep it configured automatically).

data.listener_ip: Home Assistant IP for the datalogger (optional, auto-detected)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Absaar EMS server. Please check your internet connection and try again later.
error.port_in_use: This TCP port is already in use on the Home Assistant host. Choose a different port.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This connection is already configured in Home Assistant.
